variants.name: Pure scalar-gradient admissibility
variants.purpose: Baseline: select associations by least scalar-gradient burden only.

variants.name: Split-conjugacy preserving admissibility
variants.purpose: Test whether generated +/- split relations are preserved as relation records after lift/SOO.

variants.name: Relation-complete burden admissibility
variants.purpose: Minimize burden of the relation, including cancellation and non-path balance, without predeclaring photon form.

variants.name: Successor-covariant cyclic admissibility
variants.purpose: Read candidate records across ordered scalar-field phases instead of loading three local components.

variants.name: Bounded-support closure admissibility
variants.purpose: Permit post-run separation of triangle-only scaffolds, triangle+shell, bounded-support candidates, transverse records, and unclassified carriers.
